constructors.name: Operation
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Operation class

methods.name: MergeMarks
methods.signature: public static bool MergeMarks(IList<MarkBase> marks, out List<MarkBase> mergedMarks)
methods.summary: Merges given marks objects. NOTE!! Merge requires the original mark content to be similar and of same type. Operation does not support associative notes, mark sets or template content.

params.name: marks
params.doc: Contains the of marks to be merged

returns.doc: True in case of success, false otherwise

methods.name: SortObjectsByPresentationOrder
methods.signature: public static bool SortObjectsByPresentationOrder(IList<DrawingObject> objects, out List<DrawingObject> objectsByPresentationOrder)
methods.summary: Sorts objects relatively by presentation order from active drawing. Result is used to define relative drawing order of objects which are on top of each other. Last object from the list is drawn on top of all objects.

params.name: objects
params.doc: Contains the objects layers are asked from

params.name: objectsByPresentationOrder
params.doc: Contains objects sorted by presentation order

returns.doc: True in case of success, false otherwise

methods.name: SplitMarks
methods.summary: Splits given marks to original marks.

params.name: marks
params.doc: Contains the list of marks to be splitted

returns.doc: True in case of success, false otherwise
